acceptPendingOracle(address).custom:access: Usually callable by anyone after timelock expires
acceptPendingOracle(address).custom:validation: Requires valid pending oracle and elapsed timelock
acceptPendingOracle(address).details: Can only be called after the timelock period has elapsed since submission Replaces the current oracle configuration with the pending one

params.asset: The address of the asset to accept the pending oracle for

getPrice(address).custom:reverts: OracleIsNotWorking if no valid price can be obtained
getPrice(address).details: Uses primary oracle first, falls back to backup if primary is stale or invalid Applies maxPrice cap if configured. Returns price with the aggregator's native decimals

params.asset: The address of the asset to get the price for

returns.decimals: The number of decimal places in the returned price
returns.price: The current price of the asset (may be capped by maxPrice)

revokePendingOracle(address).custom:access: Typically restricted to oracle managers or governance
revokePendingOracle(address).custom:security: Provides emergency mechanism to cancel erroneous oracle updates
revokePendingOracle(address).details: Allows oracle managers to revoke pending updates if errors are discovered Can only revoke pending oracles that haven't been accepted yet

params.asset: The address of the asset to revoke the pending oracle for

submitPendingOracle(address,(address,add.custom:access: Typically restricted to oracle managers or governance
submitPendingOracle(address,(address,add.custom:security: Subject to timelock delay for security
submitPendingOracle(address,(address,add.details: Creates a pending oracle update that must wait for the timelock period before activation Used for adding new oracles or updating existing ones with enhanced security

params.asset: The address of the asset to configure the oracle for
params.oracle: The oracle configuration structure with primary/backup feeds and settings

acceptPendingOracle(address).notice: Activates a previously submitted pending oracle configuration

getPrice(address).notice: Retrieves the current price of an asset in USD from the oracle system

revokePendingOracle(address).notice: Cancels a pending oracle configuration before it can be accepted

submitPendingOracle(address,(address,add.notice: Submits a new oracle configuration for an asset with timelock protection
